script_text: Some words in stories have special meanings.
Literal means exactly what it says. Nonliteral is a picture in words.
Raining cats and dogs does not really mean animals falling!
It is a nonliteral way to say it is raining really hard.
Her heart raced! Her heart did not run a real race.
It means she was very excited or scared!
If the words seem weird when taken literally, think about what the author really means!
Now you are ready to unlock story word meanings!
